content: FastAPI test files with Annotated[] dependency overrides must NOT use from __future__ import annotations — it breaks runtime type resolution. PAT-E-597 confirmed in S616.1 T3.
Pure logic tests (mock DB, pre-built objects) + real PG smoke test is better than SQLite-faking-PG for FastAPI auth testing. Faster unit tests, honest integration. Validated in S616.1.

Pre-implementation arch review catches proportionality and test strategy issues before code is written. Saved rework in S616.1 (avoided unnecessary schemas/auth.py file, fixed test strategy from SQLite to pure+PG).
